tweets.text: DATA: @CMEGroup's $XRP futures suite hits $62.87B in notional volume in its first year, with average daily volume of $238M and over 1.3 million contracts traded since launch. https://t.co/dmRVEgSacp
NEW: @Binance launches @SpaceX pre-IPO perpetual futures, letting retail traders speculate on the company's valuation ahead of its expected Nasdaq debut. https://t.co/EO5havv10J

LATEST: The Federal Reserve proposes a revised framework for limited master accounts, opening a 60-day comment period. A move that could give crypto firms access to Fed payment rails without full master account status. https://t.co/sBvrlHJYbC

DATA: 10% of American adults owned crypto at end of 2025, up from 7% in 2024, with spot $BTC and $ETH ETFs cited as a key driver of retail adoption, per a new Federal Reserve survey. https://t.co/DNbn51gj0W

JUST IN: Newly unsealed court filings allege Jane Street used a private Telegram channel called "Bryce's Secret" to obtain insider information from Terraform Labs before dumping $192M of $UST near par, then made $134M shorting the token as Terra's $40B ecosystem collapsed.

NEW: @Ripple Prime integrates with @Markets_EDX, giving institutional clients access to EDX's spot and perpetual futures liquidity within Ripple Prime's prime brokerage framework, with $RLUSD planned as a future settlement and collateral asset. https://t.co/llnXcQaPKD
LATEST: Nvidia reported first-quarter revenue of $81.62 billion, up 85 percent from a year earlier and above Wall Street expectations, as AI infrastructure demand continued to surge.
JUST IN: @SpaceX files for an IPO and discloses holdings of 18,712 BTC acquired at an average cost basis of roughly $35,000, per filing.

Donald Trump signs a sweeping crypto executive order, questions grow around leadership changes at the Ethereum Foundation, and Jane Street is accused of dumping $192M worth of UST before Terra��s collapse. @Jennsanasie has what you need to know. https://t.co/56lpYvlSgm
LATEST: 13 of the top 15 institutional shareholders of @Strategy $MSTR added to their positions in Q1 2026, with combined holdings increasing 27%, per company data. https://t.co/4gizgLCffn
LATEST: @SenMcCormickPA says he believes the CLARITY Act is on track to be signed into law this summer, calling it a major step for U.S. innovation and crypto leadership. https://t.co/48iwTPAM4z
UPDATE: Senator Lummis writes on X "Every single day, digital asset companies are moving offshore because Congress hasn��t done its job."

Wall Street's crypto infrastructure is here. This bonus episode of CoinDesk's Public Keys at the @NYSE from @Consensus2026 features @Grayscale's Krista Lynch on the evolution of crypto ETFs, @MorganStanley's Amy Oldenburg on MSBT becoming the firm's most successful ETF launch https://t.co/M5WBWs2RMV
SCOOP: Crypto custody firm Copper is looking to sell the company for $500 million @IanAllison123 reports https://t.co/iMHrJRwKVB
JUST IN: OpenAI is reportedly preparing to move ahead with an IPO filing "very soon," per WSJ.
